Minor'S Compromise In Scd. (As To Minor: Oksana Tam)
Off Calendar May-26-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Lois Prentice, Esq., present for Petitioner: Sherman Tam, Guardian ad Litem for Oksaana Tam.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Settlement in the amount of $5,000.00, Attorney Fees: $1,250.00, and the net balance of $3,750.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Bank of America, Chinatown Branch, #0279, 701 Grant Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94108. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd. (As To Minor: Oksana Tam)
Off Calendar May-17-2005 Continued To May-26-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2005 Continued To Jun-07-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Comp
Off Calendar Apr-12-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Lois Prentice, Esq. for Petitioner: Sherman Tam, present as Guardian at litem for: Nathan Tam, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
No fees or costs.
A net balance of $500.00 to be held in trust for the benefit of the minor.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

As to Minor: Oksana Tam, matter is continued to May 17-05 in Dept. 218 at 9:00 A.M.
Counsel to prepare and file Amended Petition with medical bills deductions.
